deferred.reason: Tax-notice domain policies (no response filed or payment remitted before the human determination; abatement requests must cite the actual facts of the taxpayer's compliance history; never advise ignoring a statutory notice; deadline-forfeiture watch — a missed response window forfeits administrative appeal rights) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final determinations exclusively to human analysts with the Tax Compliance Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Notice Intake Copilot, Abatement Request Builder, Economic-Nexus Threshold Monitor, Deadline Calendar Sentinel, Certificate Remediation Planner) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (IRS transcript/e-Services correspondence feeds, state DOR portal inboxes, ERP tax engines: SAP/Oracle/NetSuite and rate providers such as Vertex/Avalara-class services, exemption-certificate management systems, payroll providers' agency notice feeds, mailroom OCR/scanning services) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (file a notice response or protest through an agency portal, submit a penalty-abatement request, remit an assessed payment, file an amended return through the compliance engine, update the exemption-certificate repository, register for a new jurisdiction) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous filing, payment, or registration, ever.

Golden eval sets (notice triage, deadline-risk ranking, abatement-eligibility screening, duplicate-notice detection, nexus-threshold determination) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (LegalEntity, TaxAccount, Jurisdiction, Notice, Assessment, Penalty, Interest, AbatementRequest, AmendedReturn, ExemptionCertificate, FilingObligation, DeadlineClock, VoluntaryDisclosure) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the tax_notices_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (notice_intake, abatement_request, nexus_review, cert_audit_remediation, information_mismatch_response, duplicate_reconciliation) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (abatement_success_likelihood, notice_validity_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest account-anomaly scan + xgboost notice-outcome scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Notice", "Assessment", "Response due", "Deadline at risk", "Abated", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
